goalbuddy_receipt_v1.rationale: Full-path rendering is intentional: the service constructs ancestor-qualified paths, PantryManager renders location.path directly, and the accessibility evidence exposed Cold room shelf / Basket. The brief supports nested locations, so only the exact full-path E2E locator should change.

worker_package.objective: Replace only the Basket summary regex with the exact full nested path, preserve direct-summary-to-parent-details scope and strict count, then complete management and old integrated workflows with independent fresh-state lifecycles and all required evidence.
verify: Require source and mirror pre-edit SHA256 CECBF4256AB5089C14D5FFD5E65ED9FB2F40C56F4C0389799F77737FC46B20E9.
Replace only /^Basket$/u with /^Cold room shelf \/ Basket$/u and retain direct-summary parent and strict count.
Run scoped Prettier/ESLint and refresh only the spec with hash equality.
Run fresh management workflow alone with all actions, three axe checks, three overflow widths, and three screenshots.
Release port, independently prepare, then run old integrated workflow alone with full 400/350/50 behavior, two axe checks, and five screenshots.
Inspect management database read-only, run fresh disposable migrations/db check, release port, and record diff/status integrity.
stop_if: Pre-edit hash differs or any other product, fixture, assertion, timeout, or file change is required.
Locator broadens, becomes positional/forced, or weakens strictness.
Workflows share prepared state/database/server or either fails twice.

evidence: PantryManager renders each location management summary as location.path.
The rendered direct summary was Cold room shelf / Basket while /^Basket$/u matched zero.
The brief explicitly supports nested locations.

parallel_safety.rationale: One mirror, disposable data location, artifact family, and port require serial independently owned lifecycles.

missing_evidence: Read-only persistence and disposable DB proof
required_board_updates: Keep T999 blocked and require a subsequent Judge.
